name: Don't Die Dateless, Dummy!
short_description: Choose your route carefully and win the heart of a special girl or you might end up a level 30 wizard! Will you walk the path of a changed man or will your magical powers be unleashed?
detailed_description: Choose your route carefully and win the heart of a special girl or you might end up a level 30 wizard! Will you walk the path of a changed man or will your magical powers be unleashed? Inspired by the plights of members from various internet communities, will the outcome of this tale prove to be a fantasy or an all-too-famiiliar harsh reality?!
about_the_game: Choose your route carefully and win the heart of a special girl or you might end up a level 30 wizard! Will you walk the path of a changed man or will your magical powers be unleashed?
